mapper.select: SELECT address_id AS addressId, user_id AS userId, address_type AS addressType, postal_code AS postalCode, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, lat AS lat, lng AS lng FROM `petlog`.`address` WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `petlog`.address SET address_primary = #{addressPrimary}, address_secondary = #{addressSecondary}, lat = #{lat}, lng = #{lng}, postal_code = #{postalCode} WHERE address_id = #{addressId}
mapper.select: SELECT address_id AS addressId, user_id AS userId, address_type AS addressType, postal_code AS postalCode, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, lat AS lat, lng AS lng FROM `petlog`.`address` WHERE user_id != #{excludeUserId} AND address_type = 'map'
